hero.title: Engineering Systems That Scale
hero.subtitle: Enterprise Software · AI & Machine Learning · Cloud Infrastructure · IoT & Edge
hero.description: Uhereye ku buhinga bw'ubwenge gushika ku buhinga bw'ibicu, turatunganya kandi tugatanga ubuhinga butuma amashirahamwe yipfuza cane - ku gihe, ku mahera, ku rugero runini.

services.subtitle: Serivisi zacu
services.title: Ubuhinga bwuzuye
services.description: Ibibanza bitandatu vy'imyimenyerezo. Umugwi umwe. Igice cose c'ubuhinga bwawe - kuva ku bikoresho vyo ku muco gushika kuri dashboard y'ubudandaji.

customSoftware.title: Custom Software Development
customSoftware.description: Porogaramu za none zubatswe na microservices, APIs, hamwe n'ubwubatsi bw'ibicu.

aiMl.title: AI, ML & Business Intelligence
aiMl.description: Imiyoboro ya AI / ML, Power BI dashboards, hamwe n'isesengura rigezweho rihindura amakuru mu gufata ingingo.

cloud.title: Cloud Architecture & Infrastructure
cloud.description: Multi-cloud infrastructure with containers, serverless, and global scalability built in.

iot.title: IoT & Edge Computing
iot.description: Connected devices, digital twins, and edge computing for Industry 4.0.

devops.title: DevOps & Platform Engineering
devops.description: CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure as code, and observability from commit to production.

digital.title: Digital Transformation & Consulting
digital.description: Uburyo bw'ubuhinga bwa none, imigambi y'ubuhinga bwa none, hamwe n'impanuro zijanye n'ubuhinga bwa none.

cta.title: Reka twubake ikintu gikomeye
cta.description: Uhereye ku iterambere rya software hamwe n'ibisubizo bikoreshwa na AI gushika ku bikorwa remezo vy'igicu hamwe n'imashini - dutanga serivisi z'ubuhinga bwa nyuma zihuye n'ivyo ukeneye.

credibility.subtitle: Amateka yacu
credibility.title: Ivyavuye mu matora, si <gradient>imihango</gradient>
credibility.description: Kuva i Sarajevo gushika i Oslo, Amsterdam na Berlin. Inzego z'ubudandaji zashikirizwa ku gihe, igihe cose.

atlascopco.label: Cloud IAM for Atlas Copco
atlascopco.outcome: Architected the first-ever cloud-based One Identity infrastructure for Atlas Copco on Azure Kubernetes, reducing costs while keeping enterprise compliance.

orange.label: Orange Cyberdefense Platform
orange.outcome: Developed Azure Kubernetes infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, and custom ServiceNow integration for Europe's leading cybersecurity firm.

telecom.label: Telecom GIS & AR Platform
telecom.outcome: Built GIS platform mapping underground utilities across Germany with collision detection preventing multi-million Euro infrastructure damage.

iot.label: Cloud IoT & Edge Platform
iot.outcome: Azure IoT Hub igenzura ibikoresho ibihumbi n'ibihumbi, Synapse itunganya amamiliyaridi y'imirongo ya telemetry, hamwe na edge aggregation igabanya igiciro c'ubutumwa ku ~ 90%.

drone.label: Autonomous Drone Platform
drone.outcome: Custom flight controller with 4G-to-Azure IoT Hub bridge enabling autonomous BVLOS flights for agricultural monitoring and payload delivery.

payment.label: Payment System Rescue
payment.outcome: Rescued failing payment gateway for Norwegian mobile app by reverse-engineering undocumented legacy code. Zero payment downtime post-modernization.

game.label: AAA Game Dev Tooling
game.outcome: Built Maya plugin that cut 3D modeling and animation time by 50% at a major AAA studio, adopted as a standard tool in the production pipeline.

social.label: Location-Based Social Platform
social.outcome: Architected dating app for Spain's nightlife scene with geolocation matching, real-time messaging, and push notifications for a UK client.

iga.label: Multi-Tenant IGA Platform
iga.outcome: Built core backend for cloud-native identity governance platform serving Fortune 500 clients with custom ASP.NET Core Identity for NoSQL at enterprise scale.

euAdjacent.title: EU-Adjacent, Global Delivery
euAdjacent.description: Amasaha y'akazi ya CET afise ubunararibonye muri Norvège, Ubuholandi, Ubudagi n'ahandi.

yourEngineers.title: Your Engineers, Not a Vendor
yourEngineers.description: Dedicated team members embedded in your workflow and tools. Nta bakozi ba konte, nta mirongo y'amatike.

hardwareToCloud.title: Hardware to Cloud
hardwareToCloud.description: From embedded device firmware to enterprise Azure Synapse pipelines. Full-stack software across every layer.

partners.subtitle: Ubuhinga bwa none
partners.title: <gradient>Battle-Tested Stack</gradient>
partners.description: Ntidukoresha ivyo bikoresho gusa, ahubwo twarungitse ibikoresho vyo gutunganya. Kuva kuri Microsoft Azure gushika kuri Kubernetes, abahinga bacu bafise ubuhinga nyabwo.

cloudInfra.label: Cloud & Infrastructure
cloudInfra.description: Multi-cloud architecture with container orchestration and infrastructure as code.

frontend.label: Imbere
frontend.description: Modern component frameworks with type safety and optimized build tooling.

backend.label: Backend & APIs
backend.description: Enterprise-grade server platforms, systems languages, and modern API paradigms.

data.label: Data & Storage
data.description: Relational, document, and in-memory stores with full-text search.

devops.label: DevOps & Tooling
devops.description: CI/CD pipelines, version control, and developer productivity.

cloudNative.title: Cloud-Native by Default
cloudNative.description: Buri mushinga ukorwa n'amakontineri, CI / CD, kandi wubatswe ku rugero rurerure kuva ku musi wa mbere.

fullStack.title: Full-Stack Fluency
fullStack.description: From React frontends to .NET microservices to Kubernetes clusters — one team, end to end.

productionProven.title: Production-Proven
productionProven.description: Izo si ubuhinga bwa demo. Igikoresho cose casohowe gikoresha uburyo nyabwo bufasha abakoresha nyakuri muri iki gihe.

faq.subtitle: Ishingiro ry'ubumenyi
faq.title: Ibibazo bikunze <gradient>kubazwa</gradient>
faq.description: Dore ibintu bitangaje ukwiye kumenya ku bijanye no gukorana na Horizon Tech

scope.question: Akazi kawe kameze gute?
scope.answer: Dutanga imigambi y'ubuhinga bwa nyuma: software y'ubucuruzi isanzwe, imiyoboro ya AI / ML, ibikorwaremezo vy'ibicu, uburyo bwa IoT, automatisation ya DevOps, hamwe n'inama y'ihinduka rya digitale. Waba ukeneye urubuga rwuzuye rwubatswe kuva ku ntango, canke guhuza n'urupapuro rwawe ruriho, turakora ivy'ubwubatsi, iterambere, igerageza, hamwe n'ugukwiragiza.

stack.question: Ubuhinga bwawe bw'ibanze ni ubuhe?
stack.answer: Ibibanza vyacu vy'ibanze vyibanda ku mihora yo ku rwego rw'ubudandaji: Azure na AWS ku bicu, .NET na Node.js ku bijanye n'inyuma, React na Angular kuri frontend, Kubernetes na Docker kuri orchestration, na Terraform ku bikorwa remezo nka code. Dukorana kandi cane na Python ku bikorwa vya AI / ML, Power BI na Fabric ku buhinga bw'ubucuruzi, hamwe na PostgreSQL, SQL Server, na MongoDB ku makuru.

enterprise.question: Ni gute ufata imigambi y'ubudandaji?
enterprise.answer: Igikorwa cose gitangura n'igikorwa co gutohoza kugira ngo hamenyekane uburebure bw'inyubakwa, inyubakwa hamwe n'ivyiyumviro. Uronka umugwi wiyeguriye hamwe n'ubuyobozi bwa tekiniki, gusuzuma ibintu bihoraho, hamwe n'uburyo butaziguye bwo gushikira abahinga bubaka sisitemu yawe. Dukurikirana ivyigwa vya agile hamwe n'abafatanyabikorwa, tubungabunga imigambi y'imigambi, kandi dutanga raporo z'iterambere buri ndwi.

support.question: Imfashanyo ya post-launch imeze gute?
support.answer: Dutanga uburyo bwo gushigikira butunganijwe hamwe na SLA zisobanutse, harimwo kugenzura 24/7, kwishura ivyabaye, kunoza imikorere, hamwe n'ugusubiramwo ibintu. Amasezerano yacu yo gushigikira ajanye n'ugukosora amakosa, amakosa y'umutekano, gukwiragiza ibikorwa-remezo, hamwe n'igenzura ry'amagara y'abantu - bihuye n'igihe cawe co kwishura.

integration.question: Woba ushobora kwihuza n'inyubakwa zacu zisanzwe?
integration.answer: Nta gukeka. We specialize in legacy modernization, API-first integrations, and hybrid cloud migrations. Waba ukeneye guhuza n'ubuhinga bwa ERP, kwimuka kuva kuri monoliths uja kuri microservices, canke guhuza ububiko bw'amakuru n'imbere ya none, turafise ibitabo vy'ukwimuka hamwe n'ubunararibonye bwo guhuza kugira ngo bibe bitagezweho.

industries.question: Ni ayahe mahinguriro umaze gukora?
industries.answer: Umugwi wacu watanze imishinga mu nzego za fintech, amagara y'abantu, ibikoresho, ubudandaji bwo kuri internet, ingufu hamwe na reta. Turatahura ibisabwa n'amahinguriro nka PCI-DSS yo kuriha amafaranga, ivyiyumviro vya HIPAA ku makuru y'amagara y'abantu, gukurikiza GDPR ku masoko ya EU, hamwe na telemetry y'igihe nyaco ya IoT y'inganda .

engagement.question: Igikorwa co gusezerana kimeze gute?
engagement.answer: Gutangura n'umuhamagaro wo gutahura imigambi yawe n'imigambi yawe. Kuva aho, turatanga inyandiko y'ivyiyumviro hamwe n'ivyiyumviro vy'ubwubatsi, ikirangamisi, hamwe n'ugusesagura amafaranga. Tumaze kwemezwa, dutanguza n'umugwi wiyeguye, twinjira mu bikoresho vyawe hamwe n'ibikorwa vyawe, hanyuma tugatangura kwiruka ubwa mbere mu misi mike.

faq.ctaDescription: Woba ufise umugambi mu mutwe? Reka tuvuge ku bijanye n'uburebure bw'ibihe, umwanya hamwe n'amafaranga.
